iti34:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti34:2.1:
“Monks, a person without ardency, without compunction, is incapable of self-awakening,
incapable of Unbinding, incapable of attaining the unsurpassed safety from bondage.
iti34:2.2:
A person ardent & compunctious is capable of self-awakening,
capable of Unbinding, capable of attaining the unsurpassed safety from bondage.”
iti34:3.5: he’s incapable, a monk like this,
iti34:4.1: But whoever is mindful, masterful, absorbed in jhāna,
iti34:4.3: cutting the fetter of birth & aging,
iti34:4.4: touches right here a self-awakening un- surpassed.
